message:
Remove bundled pi banner

Stop shipping the startup banner as part of this package and
remove the related configuration. Users who still want the
banner can install pi-banner separately.

Update the README and changelog to document the new install
flow.

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ pi install npm:pi-fancy-footer ## 📸 Screenshots +> [!NOTE] +> Some screenshots include `pi-banner`, which is now a separate extension. +
@@ -40,6 +43,7 @@ pi install npm:pi-fancy-footer ## 🎮 Commands - `/fancy-footer` - open interactive footer config editor (small TUI) + - settings are grouped into General and Widgets sections - all widgets are listed directly (with icon prefixes) - select a widget and press Enter for detailed settings - in widget settings, adjust row/position/align/fill/min-width, visibility, @@ -53,7 +57,6 @@ Create `~/.pi/agent/fancy-footer.json`: ```json { "refreshMs": 3000, - "showPiBanner": true, "iconFamily": "unicode", "contextBarStyle": "blocks", "defaultTextColor": "dim", @@ -80,7 +83,6 @@ Create `~/.pi/agent/fancy-footer.json`: Top-level settings: - `refreshMs` (number) -- `showPiBanner` (boolean) - `iconFamily` (`nerd` | `emoji` | `unicode` | `ascii`) - `contextBarStyle`

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+---
+title: Startup banner moved to pi-banner package
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-03-31T18:36:43.729406Z
+---
+
+The startup banner has been removed from this package. It is now available as a standalone package.
+
+To continue using the banner, install `pi-banner` separately:
+
+```sh
+pi install npm:pi-banner
+```
